qaNote: All nine standard animations and sixteen look directions preserve one unclipped, scale-stable Dekomori identity with correct actions, facing, cadence, transparency, and attached twin tails.
directionNote: Both cardinal pairs and every horizontal intermediate passed blind review. The subtle 067.5-degree and 292.5-degree vertical cues remain in the correct labeled quadrants without reversal.
reviewWarnings: The 067.5-degree and 292.5-degree vertical cues are subtle, but their labeled clockwise progression remains in the intended up-right and up-left quadrants.
